title: Manipulator Posture
description:
Manipulator Posture

Manipulator Posture

Manipulator posture during the tracking motion is always the default posture regardless of the posture at the conveyor tracking calibration. To specify the posture for the tracking, write a program as shown in the following example.

Example: tracks the work piece with Lefty arm position

jump Cnv_Queget(Conveyor number,[Index])/L

NOTE:  During tracking motion, singularity avoiding function cannot be used. Therefore, set the positions of the Manipulator and the conveyor so that the Manipulator does not pass through the singularity.
